title: I left the U.S. for Trinidad and Tobago: My family of 4 spends about $3,000 a month—and we've never been happier
summary_full: Chantel Henry lives with her husband and two kids in Trinidad. She says living there has made her American Dream more affordable.
summary_public: Chantel Henry lives with her husband and two kids in Trinidad. She says living there has made her American Dream more affordable.
